name: feat-ESE-21-4
title: Carving system — polygon subtraction via density
description: Implement the carving system: subtract arbitrary polygons from the tilemap by zeroing density values within the carving shape. Handles chunk-local coordinate conversion, initialises density grid from tile polygon on first carve, marks chunks dirty, and regenerates marching squares edges.
acceptanceCriteria:
- carve(layer, shape, position) subtracts shape from tiles
- First carve on a chunk initialises density from tile polygons
- Density values set to 0 within the carving shape
- Chunk marked dirty after carving
- Marching squares regenerated on dirty chunks
- Works across chunk boundaries
- Unit tested
testingScenarios:
- Carve circle from full tile, verify density zeroed in circle area
- Carve produces correct marching squares edges
- Carve initialises density grid on first operation
- Multiple carves accumulate correctly
stakeholderUnderstanding: The carving operation that subtracts shapes from tiles.
